hero_eyebrow: Original · Handpainted · One of a Kind
hero_title: Where Every Circle Tells a Story
hero_subtitle: Hand-painted folk and mandala art crafted with intention — for walls, for minds, for moments of stillness.
about_body_1: Each painting begins as an intention — whether the radial precision of a mandala or the vibrant storytelling of folk art. Every piece is created entirely by hand, layer by layer, using fine brushes and an instinct shaped by years of practice.
about_body_2: No two are ever alike. Whether you're drawn to the meditative calm of cool blues or the energy of warm ochres, you'll find something here that speaks to you.

process_steps.title: Intention
process_steps.text: Every painting begins with a purpose — a feeling, a word, an energy to channel into the work.

process_steps.title: Creation
process_steps.text: Hours of patient brushwork, layer by layer, dot by dot, building outward from a still centre.

process_steps.title: Delivery
process_steps.text: Sealed, wrapped in tissue, and boxed with care — ready to transform your space.

testimonials.text: The painting arrived beautifully packaged. It now hangs above my meditation corner and completely transforms the energy of the room. Worth every penny.
testimonials.author: Priya S.

testimonials.text: I commissioned a custom piece and the whole experience was wonderful. The communication was thoughtful and the result was beyond what I imagined.
testimonials.author: Daniel M.

testimonials.text: Bought this as a gift — my mother was moved to tears. The detail up close is extraordinary. You can feel the care that went into every single stroke.
testimonials.author: Anaya R.

instagram_subtitle: Process videos, new work, and behind-the-scenes moments.
newsletter_subtitle: New paintings, first access to limited works, and notes from the studio — straight to your inbox.
